title: Goety Integration
description: This is an expansion mod that aims to bring greater coherence between Goety and other mods
body:
**Goety Integration**
 
Short: **GINT**
#  Intro
A mod focused on [Goety](https://modrinth.com/mod/goety) and deep cross-mod integration.
GINT brings tighter connections between various mods — all in the style of Goety.
 
But GINT is not just a cross-mod addon.
It also adds original content that goes beyond Goety, with entirely new mechanics and full integration across mods.
 
That’s all for later, though… the mod is still a work in progress.
For now, feel free to play it as a small add-on.
 
If you’re interested, join our community to discuss — the dev is always open to your ideas.
